title: Penguins and Rangers
description: This Mod Adds Several different types of Penguins Into Your Minecraft World Along With The Ability to Become a Power Ranger!
body:
![Won't support Bedrock](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/cast-iron-skillet2/Shithead@aa40fd16fbdddff65d6a99787b54a49ab63856b1/icons/wont_support_bedrock.svg)

Note: This Does Require Geckolib 1.19.2+ To Work

This Mod Adds Several different types of Penguins Into Your Minecraft World Along With The Ability to Become a Power Ranger! 

 

The main Ingredients you will need to Become a Power Ranger and Craft other Stuff in the mod are Morphing Grid Energy and Dino Fossil Energy(Mainly used For Mighty Morphin) Which you can find like any other ore.

I would Recommend using Just Enough Items (JEI) To See The Crafting Recipes as There are a lot of recipes to remember that I tried to make as Simple as Possible.

 

Currently Added Penguins:

Adelie Penguin
Chinstrap Penguin
Yellow Eyed Penguin
Rockhopper Penguin
Little Blue Penguin
Emperor Penguin
Macaroni Penguin
Gentoo Penguin
 

By Right Clicking On an Adelie penguin you can Obtain a Penguin Feather and by combining it with two diamond and an iron ingot You Can Craft PenguinSteel which can be used to craft Armor that gives you extra strength and speed in water!

 

Currently Added Teams:

All of Mighty Morphin except for the White Ranger(Coming later)
Gokaiger/Super Megaforce: Only has Red For Now (More Coming Soon)
Samurai: Only has Red(Only in Creative For Now), Blue (can Become in Survival By Crafting Ranger key or using Morpher in Creative), and Mega Mode Red(only in Creative For Now)
Megaforce: Red, Blue, and Black
 

Currently Added Weapons That Can be obtained in Survival:

Power Sword
Fire Smasher
Spin Sword
Forrest Spear
Sky Fan
Earth Slicer
Power lance
Power Axe
Power Daggers
Power Bow(Note; Might be a Little overpowered)
Gokai Saber and Gun (can only be found in destroyed Gokai Galleon)
 

Currently Added Enemies:

Putty Patroller (Spawns at night and Drops Clay When Killed and has 20 health Points)
DragonZord Boss (Has 1000 health and drops the Dragon Power Coin When Killed) (can Only be summoned using the dragon flute)
 

Note: This Is the first Mod I have Every Made So I'm a Bit New To This. Along with that it is made In MCreator so there is some limitations to what I can add as I don't really know how to code.
